PBGC Form 5500

Form 5500 Ingestor

Ingest local PDFs, remote PDF links, and EFAST search CSV exports, then assemble one deterministic all-years table.

Mode 1: Local PDF files

Select one or more Form 5500 PDF files from your device.

Mode 4: EFAST CSV upload

Upload a CSV export from the EFAST Form 5500 search website.

Mode 2: Drag and drop

Drop PDFs or an EFAST CSV file anywhere inside this target.

Drop PDFs or CSV here Press Enter to open the local PDF picker.

Mode 3: Remote PDF links

Paste one URL per line, add them to the queue, then download with a controlled concurrency.

Unified queue

All PDF, remote, and EFAST-derived items appear in one queue.

Ingest ID Source type Name Size Status Progress Actions

All years

One row per plan year with deterministic duplicate-year selection.

Column chooser
Version v0.7.0 Single-file browser build Local-only processing
